title: Section 6
content: Any ship which has been, either wholly or partly, built, altered, armed or equipped as a vessel of war in the States in contravention of section 3, or in any 1*** part of His Majesty's Dominions or 2[of India] in contravention of any like provision of law in force in that part 3*** , shall, if found in the States, be liable to forfeiture under this Act.
footnote: 1. The word "other" omitted by the A.O. 1950. 2. Subs., ibid., for "any State in India". 3. The words "or State" omitted, ibid.
